notableEvents.label: JJ Bleday GIDP
notableEvents.detail: JJ Bleday grounds into a double play, first baseman Ryan O'Hearn to shortstop Konnor Griffin to pitcher Mitch Keller. Elly De La Cruz out at 2nd. JJ Bleday out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Elly De La Cruz reached on error
notableEvents.detail: Elly De La Cruz reaches on a fielding error by second baseman Brandon Lowe.

notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Jake Mangum reaches on a fielder's choice. Tyler Callihan to 2nd. Tyler Callihan advances to 2nd, on a fielding error by second baseman Edwin Arroyo.

notableEvents.label: Elly De La Cruz GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Elly De La Cruz grounds into a double play, second baseman Brandon Lowe to shortstop Konnor Griffin to first baseman Ryan O'Hearn. Edwin Arroyo out at 2nd. Elly De La Cruz out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Nathaniel Lowe pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Nathaniel Lowe flies out to shortstop Konnor Griffin.

notableEvents.detail: Konnor Griffin grounds into a double play, third baseman Sal Stewart to catcher Tyler Stephenson. Esmerlyn Valdez out at home. Tyler Callihan out at 3rd.
